title: Publication (Output)
description: Record of publishing an approved outreach artifact to an external channel. Created by POST /v1/artifacts/{id}/publish. The default connector is 'simulated' — it records the act and emits an outbox event but makes no real external post; only approved artifacts can be published.

artifact_id.description: 被發布的元件，必須為 approved。

connector.description: 連接器；目前為 simulated（未實際對外發文）。

external_ref.description: 外部參照（模擬連接器為 sim-… 前綴）。

examples.detail: 模擬連接器：已記錄發布動作，未實際對外發文。
